purpose: MECE page-type segmentation of client page_view Views. Segments are mutually exclusive and sum to All (Others = All - the rest).

docs.note: astro-docs; ~0 before ~Sep 2025 (docs lived at root paths before the migration -> those land in Others for that period)

marketing.note: The Framer-hosted marketing pages (from the nx.dev Framer sitemap). These existed as next.js pages before the 2026-02-27 Framer migration and as Framer after; the path set is stable so the regex captures both eras. Homepage '/' is Framer too but is counted separately as Home.

others.note: Everything else: /getting-started, /reference, /nx-api, /concepts, /recipes, /troubleshooting, etc. Pre-Oct-2025 this is large because docs lived at root paths.

coverage.daily: blog + marketing daily are 2025-05-01..2026-06-18 (Explore is capped at ~14mo retention).
coverage.pre_2025_05: For Jan-Apr 2025 (before daily coverage) blog and marketing are NOT separately scraped; they fall into Others on the monthly chart. Flagged in the data as blog/marketing = null for those months.
